dropzone.overlayLabel: Drop to import into this folder
dropzone.overlayHint: PDF, DOCX or text — 25 MB max per file
dropzone.rejectedSummary: {count, plural, one {# file skipped: {detail}.} other {# files skipped: {detail}.}}

folder.deleteDescription: {count, plural, =0 {“{name}” will be deleted. All the documents it contains will move back to the root — they are not lost.} one {“{name}” will be deleted along with its # subfolder. All the documents it contains (including those in subfolders) will move back to the root — they are not lost.} other {“{name}” will be deleted along with its # subfolders. All the documents it contains (including those in subfolders) will move back to the root — they are not lost.}}

newFolder.title: New folder
newFolder.description: Folders help you organize your documents by client, legal matter or subject. You can nest other folders inside them.

versionDiff.dialogDescription: Differences in the extracted text. Identical passages are collapsed. This does not replace a review of the final document.
versionDiff.noDifference: No textual difference between v{older} and v{newer}.
versionDiff.truncated: Large comparison: only the start of the differences is shown.
versionDiff.linesUnchanged: {count, plural, one {# unchanged line} other {# unchanged lines}}

row.deleteDescription: “{name}” and all its previous versions will be permanently deleted. The extracted text and associated RAG chunks will be removed.
row.olderVersions: {count, plural, one {# previous version} other {# previous versions}}
row.toastIndexed: {count, plural, one {Document indexed (# segment).} other {Document indexed (# segments).}}
row.toastNoMistralKey: No active Mistral key — cannot index.

page.title: Documents
page.helpBody: Import your PDF / DOCX files (≤ 25 MB), organize them into folders and version them. Then query them from the chat (attachment or semantic search).
page.intro: Your files are stored on your own infrastructure (S3, MinIO, OVH Object Storage…). Organize them into folders and attach them to your conversations.
page.docsTotal: {count, plural, one {# document in total} other {# documents in total}}
page.emptyRootBody: Import your first files — Louis extracts the text automatically. You can then attach them to a conversation to query their contents.
page.emptyFolderBody: No documents or subfolders here. Use Import or New folder.
page.formatsBody: PDF, DOCX and plain text. Limit: 25 MB per file, ~500,000 extracted characters (beyond that, extraction is truncated). Each document is indexed for semantic search (RAG) as soon as an active Mistral key is configured.

reindexAll.noKey: No active embedding key — cannot index.
reindexAll.partial: {indexed, plural, one {# document indexed} other {# documents indexed}}, {failed} failed.
reindexAll.success: {count, plural, one {# document indexed.} other {# documents indexed.}}
reindexAll.title: Index documents not yet indexed for semantic search (RAG)

uploadButton.uploadError: {count, plural, one {# file out of {total} could not be imported.} other {# files out of {total} could not be imported.}}
